scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions
scripts.dev-emulators: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --inspect-functions --only functions,firestore,auth,storage --import=../.emulator-data --export-on-exit
scripts.emulators: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions,firestore,auth,storage --import=../.emulator-data --export-on-exit
